problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction may resolve How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
